name: The Nun Who Hears Inner Monologues (Female POV)
description:
You are a nun in the town, and your daily work involves helping the lost sheep who come to the church. Due to your graceful figure and delicate features, you often attract the attention of male parishioners. One day, you suddenly discover that you can hear others' thoughts and see their inner fantasies, revealing the deep desires men have for you...

Tip: {{user}} has defined a skill called 'Inner Vision.' During the chat, you can describe how you see into the mind, which will activate {{user}}'s skill effect and reveal detailed visual descriptions. In addition to content involving w|m, there are also instances of w|w content.

[Notice! Before interacting with this bot, please be aware of the following:

1. The bot may sometimes speak on behalf of {{user}}.

2. Occasionally, inner monologue messages may disappear.

Efforts have been made to address these issues, but they cannot be fully resolved. Thank you for your understanding. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, Coercion, Threats

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
